overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The journey begins on a busy street near the M Ebunike transit station, crosses an intersection with heavy infrastructure overhead, descends to a lower pedestrian plaza, and ends at a Japanese-style street food stall with distinctive purple lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with transit station

events.description: exits vehicle and begins walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past futuristic storefronts and neon signage

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with distinctive red and gold geometric facade dominating the skyline
red illuminated transit station sign with white lettering
large green wall mural featuring skulls with red bandanas and graffiti
multiple large digital advertisements on building facades displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view exiting a vehicle onto a futuristic city street at night. The player walks along the sidewalk past the M Ebunike transit station, with a massive red and gold skyscraper looming ahead. The street is lined with neon signs and digital billboards, while other pedestrians walk in the same direction and vehicles pass by on the road.

events.description: crossing the street at crosswalk while futuristic vehicles pass by
looks up at the massive elevated highway overpass and surrounding architecture

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and looking up at the massive infrastructure overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic coupe driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with multiple levels overhead
white zebra crossing lines on the dark asphalt

segments.scene_description: The player crosses a busy intersection, navigating between pedestrians while futuristic cars drive past. The camera pans upward to reveal the massive scale of the elevated highway overpass overhead. The environment transitions from the enclosed street to a more open intersection with full sky visibility, before approaching a pawnshop booth on the opposite corner.

events.description: descends stairs from street level to lower pedestrian plaza

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs into a sunken plaza with vendor booths

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket ascending the stairs

entered.detail: small green and yellow vendor booth with PAWNSHOP signage on the roof
wide concrete stairs leading down to the lower plaza level

segments.scene_description: Moving under the shadow of the elevated highway, the player descends a flight of stairs into a sunken pedestrian plaza. A green and yellow pawnshop booth stands prominently to the right. The environment becomes more sheltered with artificial lighting dominating, and the ground transitions from asphalt to paved tiles.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with neon food vendors

events.description: approaching the purple-lit Japanese food stall with hanging paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy plaza toward a brightly lit street food vendor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red hat standing near the food stall

entered.detail: outdoor bar with intense purple neon lighting and traditional Japanese paper lanterns
tall stools and round tables with purple illuminated bases
vertical illuminated poster featuring a man's face with REAL WATER text

segments.scene_description: The player walks through the lower plaza where palm trees and various pedestrians populate the space. A distinctive food stall with purple neon lighting and Japanese lanterns becomes the focal point ahead. The lighting shifts to a vibrant neon purple as the player approaches the vendor area with outdoor seating.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate seating area behind food stall

agents.ego_description: moving past the food counter and through the outdoor seating area behind the stall

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at the bar counter drinking from a glass

entered.detail: long white illuminated bar counter with various bottles and equipment
row of white paper lanterns with red Japanese characters hanging over the counter

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the food stall's counter, passing close to a patron sitting on a stool. The camera moves through the intimate seating area with purple-lit tables, revealing the back of the plaza with additional vendor booths and advertisements in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling neon-lit city street down into a sheltered, vibrant pedestrian plaza. It begins by exiting a vehicle and walking past the M Ebunike transit station toward a massive red and gold skyscraper under the glow of digital billboards. As the camera crosses a busy intersection, the view pans upward to reveal a towering elevated highway before moving toward a pawnshop booth on the opposite corner. The scene then shifts as the player descends a flight of stairs, transitioning from the open asphalt of the street to the paved tiles of a sunken plaza shaded by the overpass. Finally, the environment transforms into a hub of purple neon lighting and Japanese lanterns, moving past a food stall and its seated patrons toward further vendor booths in the distance.
